---
applyTo: "docs/integration/**/*.md"
---

Integration docs map CPoP to external ecosystems: C2PA (c2pa.org), CAWG (cawg.io), DIF (identity.foundation).

- GitHub-flavored Markdown (not kramdown-rfc)
- SPDX header: `[//]: # (SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0)`
- Use tables for concept mapping — each doc self-contained
- Never claim integrations are finalized — these are proposed patterns
- Cross-reference `cddl/cpop.cddl` and draft sections for CPoP details
